body.u: I let the curtains fall back into place and step back from the window. Outside a happy reunion takes place between a grey haired woman of my age and her suntanned children and grandchildren who have just arrived from Australia to celebrate her 67th birthday. Her life is how I never wanted mine to be when I was a teenager.

I remember well leaving those school days behind and starting my career in London working for a fashion magazine. At first it was tiring because I was travelling each day from my home in Sheppey but as I gradually settled down I met many people I met many people and eventually moved into a flat in Chelsea. Because of my work I met up and coming actresses and actors, recording artists and models.

After a time there I moved from junior work to fashion editor and met a young designer although he had just started off in business on his own I thought his clothes would catch on and decided to become a partner. Gradually through a close businesbusiness
